steps.title: Identify the similarity
steps.content: From the notes, the only feature both birds share is location: each can be found on the Galápagos Island of Floreana. Their weights differ enormously ($2.5$ kg vs. $9$ g), so weight is a contrast, not a similarity.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
Choice C presents the shared trait directly: both species can be found on Floreana. A emphasizes a weight contrast, B describes only the finch, and D doesn't mention the finch at all.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
